page_content:
Restriction: Must be in the Honors College Integrated Life Sciences program.

Credit Only Granted for: BSCI207, BSCI279D, or HLSC207.

HLSC217 The British Masters of Science (3 Credits)

The British Masters of Science will look at the British Scientists who have been at the forefront of some of history's greatest advances and have shaped science as we know it today. This London study abroad program will explore these scientific masters in the city where they made their great contributions, visiting the places where they lived and worked to experience the historic foundations of science.
